answer:
The soft glow of the salon lights cast an ethereal sheen over the pristine white counters, reminiscent of a bygone era where floral arrangements bloomed with elegance. Amidst the delicate scent of lavender and the gentle murmur of conversations, one couldn't help but notice the intricate details of the surrounding flora, particularly those that thrive in the shade of towering hedges.
